column5: This is YOUR very own app. Every day you use it, something good happens.
column6: “We’re all going to help you with your routines as a team”

column5: Tap each task as you finish it. Complete the whole routine and we get to celebrate! 🎉
column6: “Look out for surprise rewards and treats for goals  and milestone achievements.”

column5: Tap ⚡ whenever you do something 1% better than yesterday, or you have a little extra time or energy.
column6: "Little by little. Day by day. That's the real magic. 💜"

column5: Show up every day and your streak grows. Long enough and you unlock real-life rewards. 🏆
column6: "Every day you come back… we'll be here waiting to celebrate your achievements 🩵"

column5: You don't have to be perfect. You just have to show up and do your best 💜
column6: “The human version of consistency is not 100%, and our best can vary day to day.”
